name: Boho Rattan Kids' Table Lamp - Pillowfort™
description: Cast a warm, inviting glow in your kiddo's space with this Boho Rattan Table Lamp from Pillowfort™. The table lamp is designed with a lovely base of open-weave beige rattan to give a handcrafted look you'll love, and it's topped with a simple drum-shaped boho shade in white for diffusing light with a soft glow. Plus, the one-way light setting allows for easy operation. Whether you place this table lamp in their bedroom, playroom or nursery, you'll love the charming style this accent lamp brings to your kid's space.
